expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[Width], [Height], [Depth] 是总测量值，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดของไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของไม้ด้านบน, ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na mga Board, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Likurang Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘိနက်အတွက်ဘုတ်အရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်အပေါ်၊ အောက်နှင့် အနားဘက် ဘုတ်အဆူလေးဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ဘုတ်အဆူလေးဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាដុំឈើសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាទំហំសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជារាងកាយ កម្រាស់នៃឈើ ក្នុងលំហ័កំពូល,បាតនិងចំហៀង [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់នៃសារៈពិតរបស់ម្ខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດຂອງບອດສຳລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ຫມາຍເຖິງຂະຫນາດລວມທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາວັດສະດຸຂອງດ້ານເທິງ, ດ້ານລຸ່ມ ແລະຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດສະດຸຂອງບອດທ້າຍ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板のサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は全体の寸法、[BoardThick] は上部、底部、側部の板の素材の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] は背面板の素材の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 치수이며, [BoardThick]는 상, 하, 측면 보드 재질의 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재질의 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son las medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialdicke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialdicke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] ऊपरी, निचले और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] являются общими измерениями, [BoardThick] — это толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковой части доски, [BackBoardThick] — это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
